title: Protected End Blocks
description: Prevent The Enderdragon from breaking all end blocks and more
body:
Protected End Blocks

Prevent The Enderdragon from breaking a wider range of end dimension blocks as well as hard blocks or utility blocks

Features

  • The Enderdragon is unable to destroy a wide range of End Dimension blocks including: variants of End stone, Purper, Chorus plants or flowers, Dragon heads and eggs, Ender Chests
  • Other Protected blocks include all colours of banners and shulker boxes, purple stained glass and panes, all types of signs and Lodestones
  • Hard blocks such as Netherite blocks, Ancient debris, Beacons plus its pyramid blocks (Iron, Gold, Diamond and Emerald), and Amethyst blocks cannot be destroyed by the dragon
  • Map making blocks such as the light block have been protected
  • Compatible with Minecraft 1.13 and up, last tested on Minecraft 1.19
